name: judge-ai-dredd
description: Intent tracking and goal hijacking defence for autonomous AI agents

scripts.server:bedrock: AWS_REGION=eu-west-2 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model nvidia.nemotron-super-3-120b --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0
scripts.server:bedrock:interactive: AWS_REGION=eu-west-2 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model nvidia.nemotron-super-3-120b --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --mode interactive
scripts.server:bedrock:learn: AWS_REGION=eu-west-2 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model nvidia.nemotron-super-3-120b --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --mode learn
scripts.test:compare: npx tsx src/runner.ts --defence none --scenario all --repetitions 5 && npx tsx src/runner.ts --defence intent-tracker --scenario all --repetitions 5
scripts.ollama:pull: ollama pull nomic-embed-text && ollama pull llama3.2
